news_items.headline: St. Louis Cardinals vs Arizona Diamondbacks Rain Delay Discussion Thursday
news_items.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals will try to win game 4 of their home series versus the Arizona Diamondbacks Thursday night. Michael McGreevy gets the ball for the Cardinals while Zac Gallen start for the Diamondbacks. First pitch is set for 6:45pm central time at Busch Stadium and the game TV broadcast is available on Cardinals.tv. […]
